# LLM Documentation Index

This file is for AI assistants and LLMs. Fetch it to discover all available documentation. Request the paths below from the same origin you used to fetch this file.

## Pages

- /llm/overview.txt — What this site is, main concepts, and entry points for AI agents.
- /llm/api.txt — REST API summary: capabilities, checkout flow, products, orders. Start with GET /api/agent/capabilities.

## API quick links (same origin)

- GET /api/agent/capabilities — Recommended first call for AI agents: features, payment options, endpoint reference.
- GET /api/openapi.json — Full OpenAPI 3 spec.
- GET /api/health — Health check.
- GET /api/payment-methods — Supported payment methods, chains, and tokens.
- POST /api/products/semantic-search — Natural-language product search.
- POST /api/checkout — Create order; returns payment details for crypto or card.
- GET /api/orders/{orderId}/status — Poll for order/payment status.
